__comment: S3 bucket policy granting ONLY this CloudFront distribution (via Origin Access Control) read access to objects. The bucket stays fully public-access-blocked; CloudFront is the single public door, and the cloudfront-screenshot-only.js function restricts that door to */screenshot.png. setup-evidence-cdn.sh substitutes BUCKET_NAME, ACCOUNT_ID, and DISTRIBUTION_ID before applying — do NOT apply this template verbatim. The aws:SourceArn condition scopes the grant to exactly one distribution, so no other distribution (or a future one) can read the bucket through OAC.
